name: ▼スライム娘は人間と友達になりたいようだ+
slug: スライム娘は人間と友達になりたいようだ
short_description: “Hello, humans! Will you be my friend?” This is a point-and-click novel game about Aura, a slime girl who wants to become friends with humans. Aura is pure and innocent, and easily influenced by the emotions of the humans she meets...
detailed_description:
【Overview】

Young slime girl Aura has lived her whole life inside the forest. One day, a group of humans pass by and give her a glimpse into the world outside. Her forest friends warn her against getting too close, but Aura just can't quiet her curious mind. A talking rose takes notice of Aura's fascination of humans and promises to help her make friends with them. How will Aura's journey unfold from here?

【Game Details】

This is a visual novel with multiple endings and click-to-interact elements. The atmosphere is a fairytale picture book with dark, sometimes horrifying moments.

【Content New to the ""Plus"" Version】

The Steam version contains two additional routes in the main story and two side stories in the ""Extra"" menu. Several illustrations and extra pieces of dialogue have also been added to the main story.

【Content Creation Permissions】

The author permits recording and streaming of their work. Please include the URL to the Steam page for this game if you choose to publish any secondary works containing content from it.
